title: Command Utility
description: Command Utility is a mod that attempts to add commands and features from spigot plugins such as EssentialsX - For NeoForge, Forge.
body:
![Requires OrCore (with image of the mod OrCore)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53153127b7751e34c6d933d67ff634aa5c3a6e8c.png)
> People sometimes don't read all of this, Modrinth.

# Social Links
Visit the offical discord server by [clicking here!](https://discord.gg/hsEA8h3enQ)


# About the mod
[Command Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/com-util) is a [mod](https://modrinth.com/mods) that adds commands and features like spigot plugins such as EssentialsX. I am also soon releasing a version for Fabric but it seems to always FAIL to work properly

# Things to note about the mod
[Command Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/com-util) may be a requirement to other mods such as my mods for, ... i don't know. Probably to avoid MOD CONFLICT.
[Command Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/com-util) is not a library mod for other mods.
I haven't checked if [Command Utility](https://modrinth.com/mod/com-util) is illegal or legal because of copying spigot plugins such as EssentialsX, and a few other plugins.

# How did I make this?
[I](https://modrinth.com/user/ItsOriginalYT) made it with MCreator. Without the help of MCreator, building mods would be much more harder. As each update of MCreator releases, building mods would become more and more easier and the design of MCreator would look GREAT.
So, thank you to MCreator for making mod building easier :D
